hero.sub: From corner kiosks to coffee shops, restaurants and laundries — AmanaPOS handles the till, inventory, staff and reports on a single phone. No bulky terminal, no contracts.

feat.sub: One app for the till, the inventory, the staff and the numbers — designed for the realities of running a shop in Sudan.
feat.g1B: Tap, ring up, charge. Built for one-handed use on a phone, just as fast on tablet.
feat.g2B: Real-time stock, low-stock alerts, multi-location transfers and barcode-friendly SKUs.
feat.g3B: Daily takings, top sellers, peak hours, tax — on a single screen, exportable to PDF.
feat.g4B: Managers and cashiers, PIN logins, shift drawers and role-based access on every action.
feat.g5B: Power cuts and patchy networks are a feature, not a bug. Sales sync when you reconnect.
feat.g6B: Sudanese pound formatting, 10% VAT baked in. Receipts that look right on the first try.

how.sub: No installations, no servers. Open the app and start selling.
how.s1B: Phone, OTP, business name. That's it — no paperwork, no salesperson.
how.s2B: Type a few items or import a list. Categories, prices, stock — done in one screen.
how.s3B: Hand a phone to your cashier. Sales, receipts and reports are already running.

price.sub: No hidden fees, no transaction cuts. Cancel any time.
price.p1B: Everything you need to start selling today.
price.p2B: For growing shops that need more horsepower.
price.p3B: For chains with multiple branches and devices.

download.title: Download AmanaPOS today. Sell tomorrow.
download.subtitle: Available on iPhone and Android. Free to start, no card required.

foot.tag: The point of sale built for Sudanese merchants. Sell anywhere — phone, tablet, counter.
